description_long: This is a roughly hewn, irregularly shaped stone block with a weathered, pitted surface and a mix of earthy tones, including tan, ochre, and reddish hues. The stone features several natural cavities and indentations, giving it a rugged, aged appearance. One side displays a more angular, flat face with visible tool marks and a reddish tint, suggesting it may have been partially shaped or broken from a larger piece. The other sides are more uneven, with jagged edges and a coarse texture. The stone's surface is matte and rough, with visible mineral deposits and some areas of discoloration. Its overall form and finish suggest it could serve as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban or landscaped environment.
description: A rugged, irregular stone block with a rough, pitted surface and earthy tan and reddish tones. It features natural cavities, jagged edges, and a weathered, matte finish.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stone's uneven top surface with deep pits and a mix of tan and ochre colors.
description_view_1: This side shows a flatter, more angular face with reddish discoloration and visible tool marks.
description_view_2: This angle reveals a long, rough side with a blend of tan and red hues and several small holes.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the block's most irregular, jagged side with pronounced surface texture and weathering.
attribute_location: urban park, sidewalk edge, or landscaped public space
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a low barrier along pathways
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and natural veining with some reddish streaks and mineral deposits; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with visible signs of erosion and surface discoloration, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with smooth man-made surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may accumulate debris or vegetation in crevices.
